Query:
UNLOAD (SELECT bs."in.geometry_building_type_recs" AS geometry_building_type_recs, sum(1) AS sample_count, sum(bs.weight) AS units_count, sum(bs."out.electricity.total.energy_consumption" * bs.weight) AS "electricity.total.energy_consumption__baseline", sum(up."out.electricity.total.energy_consumption" * bs.weight) AS "electricity.total.energy_consumption__upgrade", sum((coalesce(bs."out.electricity.total.energy_consumption", 0) - coalesce(up."out.electricity.total.energy_consumption", 0)) * bs.weight) AS "electricity.total.energy_consumption__savings", approx_percentile(bs."out.electricity.total.energy_consumption", ARRAY[0, 0.02, 0.1, 0.25, 0.5, 0.75, 0.9, 0.98, 1]) AS "electricity.total.energy_consumption__baseline__quartiles", approx_percentile(bs."out.electricity.total.energy_consumption", ARRAY[0, 0.02, 0.1, 0.25, 0.5, 0.75, 0.9, 0.98, 1]) FILTER (WHERE bs."out.electricity.total.energy_consumption" != 0) AS "electricity.total.energy_consumption__baseline__nonzero_quartiles", approx_percentile(up."out.electricity.total.energy_consumption", ARRAY[0, 0.02, 0.1, 0.25, 0.5, 0.75, 0.9, 0.98, 1]) AS "electricity.total.energy_consumption__upgrade__quartiles", approx_percentile(up."out.electricity.total.energy_consumption", ARRAY[0, 0.02, 0.1, 0.25, 0.5, 0.75, 0.9, 0.98, 1]) FILTER (WHERE up."out.electricity.total.energy_consumption" != 0) AS "electricity.total.energy_consumption__upgrade__nonzero_quartiles", approx_percentile(coalesce(bs."out.electricity.total.energy_consumption", 0) - coalesce(up."out.electricity.total.energy_consumption", 0), ARRAY[0, 0.02, 0.1, 0.25, 0.5, 0.75, 0.9, 0.98, 1]) AS "electricity.total.energy_consumption__savings__quartiles", approx_percentile(coalesce(bs."out.electricity.total.energy_consumption", 0) - coalesce(up."out.electricity.total.energy_consumption", 0), ARRAY[0, 0.02, 0.1, 0.25, 0.5, 0.75, 0.9, 0.98, 1]) FILTER (WHERE coalesce(bs."out.electricity.total.energy_consumption", 0) - coalesce(up."out.electricity.total.energy_consumption", 0) != 0) AS "electricity.total.energy_consumption__savings__nonzero_quartiles" 
FROM resstock_2024_amy2018_release_2_metadata AS bs JOIN resstock_2024_amy2018_release_2_metadata AS up ON bs.bldg_id = up.bldg_id AND bs.upgrade = 0 AND up.upgrade = 1 AND up.applicability = true 
WHERE bs.applicability = true AND bs.upgrade = 0 AND bs."in.state" = 'CO' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1) 
 TO 's3://resstock-core/bsq_athena_unload_results/528b833c3f10961f3e46c30164ffd5a121c4b23bb694d60918389577a406997c/bb8922b5-aa20-4246-a2bd-b09f2222419c/' 
 WITH (format = 'PARQUET')
